id: disconnect-spotify

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/spotify/disconnect"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the Spotify OAuth credentials and disconnects the integration. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
